data.title: Senator Lummis Highlights Importance of U.S. Leadership in Digital Assets
data.description: According to Foresight News, U.S. Senator Cynthia Lummis, chair of the Senate Banking Subcommittee on Digital Assets, recently emphasized the significance of digital assets for the future. She stated that it is the responsibility of the United States to ensure continued leadership in this sector.

data.title: ‘Things Are About To Get Silly’: Analyst Says Bitcoin on Cusp of Most Aggressive Expansion Since Inception
data.description:
A widely followed analyst and trader believes Bitcoin (BTC) is set to go even higher after recently hitting a new all-time high. The analyst, pseudonymously known as Credible Crypto, tells his 467,200 followers on the social media platform X that Bitcoin is now in the final phase of a bullish cycle.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/05/23/things-are-about-to-get-silly-analyst-says-bitcoin-on-cusp-of-most-aggressive-expansion-since-inception/

data.title: Bitcoin's Surge Shifts Market Focus to XRP and SOL
data.description:
According to PANews, Bitcoin's recent rise above $110,000 has led to a market shift towards major altcoins like XRP and SOL. Bitget's Chief Analyst, Ryan Lee, noted that XRP is benefiting from regulatory clarity and a technical breakout, potentially increasing its mid-term price to between $3 and $8. The XRP/BTC weekly chart has shown a bullish 'golden cross' signal. Meanwhile, SOL might reach $220 to $300, driven by ETF expectations
source: https://www.binance.com/en/square/post/24622809321754?utm_source=BinanceNewsRSS

data.title: Bitcoin's Surge Shifts Market Focus to XRP and SOL
data.description: According to PANews, Bitcoin's recent rise above $110,000 has led to a market shift towards major altcoins like XRP and SOL. Bitget's Chief Analyst, Ryan Lee, noted that XRP is benefiting from regulatory clarity and a technical breakout, potentially increasing its mid-term price to between $3 and $8. The XRP/BTC weekly chart has shown a bullish 'golden cross' signal. Meanwhile, SOL might reach $220 to $300, driven by ETF expectations. Despite ongoing macroeconomic uncertainties, QCP Capital believes the current rally has a more solid foundation, with market sentiment not yet overheated.

data.title: U.S. Pressures EU for Unilateral Tariff Reductions Amid Trade Talks
data.description: According to PANews, U.S. President Donald Trump's trade representatives are urging the European Union to unilaterally reduce tariffs on American goods. Sources indicate that without concessions, the EU may face additional tariffs and struggle to make progress in negotiations. U.S. Trade Representative Jamieson Greer is expected to inform EU Trade Commissioner Maroš Šefčovič that the EU's recent 'explanatory note' for negotiations falls short of U.S. expectations. The U.S. is dissatisfied with the EU's proposal for mutual tariff reductions, preferring a unilateral commitment similar to other trade partners. Additionally, the EU has not included its proposed digital tax in the negotiation agenda as requested by the U.S. Insiders reveal that while the EU seeks a mutually recognized framework for talks, significant differences remain between the two parties.

data.title: NERO Chain completes early financing, the specific amount has not been disclosed yet
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, NERO Chain has received investment from many Japanese leading institutions and global capital. Arcanum Capital (with Tether as a participant), Csquare Venture, Oddiyana Ventures, Triple GEM Capital and other institutions have completed early investment, and the specific amount of financing has not been disclosed.
Recently, NTT Digital, a subsidiary of NTT, Japan's largest telecommunications company, and CoinTrade, an exchange under Ceres, a listed company on the Tokyo Stock Exchange main board, have officially become NERO node operators. At the same time, they have reached a strategic investment cooperation with Mercury, including the establishment of a joint venture with CoinPost, a large Japanese Web3 media, and the leading law firm Dentons as the legal and strategic partner of NERO Chain. In addition, NERO is also negotiating with a number of Japanese traditional industry giants and well-known car companies to accelerate the implementation of RWA Japanese scenarios.
In addition, NERO Chain is preparing for the release of NFT and the main network, and it is expected that NFT will be launched next week.
